synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-3042 Moderate: Oracle Linux 8 openssl security update
description:
[1:1.1.1k-15]
- Fix CVE-2025-69419: Arbitrary code execution due to out-of-bounds write in PKCS#12 processing
  ticket_lifetime_hint exceed 1 week in TLSv1.3 and breaks compliant clients
  Resolves: RHEL-149165
  Resolves: RHEL-142715

[1:1.1.1k-14.1]
- Backport fix for openssl: Out-of-bounds read & write in RFC 3211 KEK Unwrap
  Fix CVE-2025-9230
  Resolves: RHEL-128615
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-3042

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-3042.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
openssl-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
openssl-devel-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.i686.rpm
openssl-devel-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
openssl-libs-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.i686.rpm
openssl-libs-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
openssl-perl-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
openssl-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.aarch64.rpm
openssl-devel-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.aarch64.rpm
openssl-libs-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.aarch64.rpm
openssl-perl-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/openssl-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-69419




Description of changes:

[1:1.1.1k-15]
- Fix CVE-2025-69419: Arbitrary code execution due to out-of-bounds write in PKCS#12 processing
  ticket_lifetime_hint exceed 1 week in TLSv1.3 and breaks compliant clients
  Resolves: RHEL-149165
  Resolves: RHEL-142715

[1:1.1.1k-14.1]
- Backport fix for openssl: Out-of-bounds read & write in RFC 3211 KEK Unwrap
  Fix CVE-2025-9230
  Resolves: RHEL-128615
